variants.name: 自动售货机
variants.ability: 每个夜晚，你要选择一个邪恶角色：你会得知两名存活的玩家，他们均不为该角色。
variants.firstNightReminder: Wake the player and have them point to an evil character on the script. Point to two players and then put them back to sleep
variants.otherNightReminder: Wake the player and have them point to an evil character on the script. Point to two players and then put them back to sleep
